content:
[GRAMOPHONE BUZZ, PLACING A SHELLAC DISC, STARTING. . .]

OPENING LOG D-03. Welcome to Eclipse Seventy-Seventh Regiment, where the victory is always secured with us. T H E E L I T E S A R E H E R E.

// FOUNDING AND HISTORY

The Eclipse Seventy-Seventh Regiment was made on 31/03/1915 during the First World War as a counter to any army that would encounter the main HQ. E77R is mainly concentrated in marksmanship, trained to fight against armies acting as their own special forces, but also to carry out covert missions around the world in which barely anyone had knowledge of, except for the Director, who ordered and possibly commanded indirectly.

Those missions were what built the rest of Pandora's Acolytes LLC. It was their startup, their actual start with the recently gathered intel. E77R was then considered greatly important for the GOI and was offered a serum. A super-soldier serum which improved their motor skills, perception, intelligence, strength, and endurance. The serum was developed by Erebus Research's smartest researchers. At the time their machinery and budget was not even adequate. How could they achieve this?

This is where the covert operations come back in. Those operations involved stealing tech labs that had just started appearing around the world. Thanks to E77R and Erebus Research collaborating together, E77R became a group of elite trained super-soldiers that usually provide marksmen and recon support, sometimes even going on their own missions, knowing that no regular human could ever defeat them.

// THE STANDOUT: CODENAME "RAG"

There was one special standout among E77R's personnel. Someone named Rag. They have handled almost all of the dirty work that the main combatants could not handle.

[SHELLAC DISC ENDS]
// INCIDENT LOG 07/04/1989
[CLASSIFIED INCIDENT LOG]

A squad composed of Director Gamma, Rag, NO-08, NO-03, and Magma was sent out after an anomalous artifact kept in Facility REDACTED. They were supposed to retrieve the artifact unharmed.

There was something off about that mission. Why would the Director herself be involved when she is an important asset? These missions are usually handled by E77R, as they are sneaky and manage to get into places no one else could.

Twelve hours later, only one operative returned. Codename Rag. He had successfully retrieved the artifact in question. That artifact has been catalogued as REG AN-071. What could have possibly happened in that facility that only one man came back alive? Following this incident, Rag is to be kept on watch at all times.

// CURRENT DIVISIONAL STANDING
DIVISION STATUSACTIVE
SPECIALIZATIONMARKSMANSHIP, RECON, SPECIAL OPERATIONS
CLEARANCE LEVELCHI "EXOUSIA" AND ABOVE
ENHANCEMENTSSUPER-SOLDIER SERUM (EREBUS RESEARCH, CLASS-IV)
NOTABLE PERSONNEL"RAG" (ACTIVE), OTHERS REDACTED
NOTICE: PERSONNEL RECORDS FOR E77R ARE RESTRICTED TO CLEARANCE LEVEL-CHI AND ABOVE. ATTEMPTING TO ACCESS FULL ROSTER WITHOUT ADEQUATE CLEARANCE WILL BE REPORTED TO LAMINA PANDORAE.
